news.title:
Wipro's Q4FY26 results today may include dividend/buyback updates, continuing its trend of rewarding shareholders.
Wipro's evolving strategy includes higher dividends, bonus issues, and buybacks, reflecting robust cash flows and profitability.
news.summary:
Wipro's Q4FY26 results today may include dividend/buyback updates, continuing its trend of rewarding shareholders.
Wipro's evolving strategy includes higher dividends, bonus issues, and buybacks, reflecting robust cash flows and profitability.

news.title:
Wipro's Q4FY26 results will test CEO Srini Pallia's turnaround strategy, focusing on AI monetisation and growth signals.
Investors await AI-led revenue updates, growth guidance, and operational efficiency to gauge Wipro's recovery trajectory.
news.summary:
Wipro's Q4FY26 results will test CEO Srini Pallia's turnaround strategy, focusing on AI monetisation and growth signals.
Investors await AI-led revenue updates, growth guidance, and operational efficiency to gauge Wipro's recovery trajectory.

news.title:
Wipro, HDFC Life, HDFC AMC, CRISIL, Angel One among firms announcing Q4 results today.
Stocks in focus include HDBFS, ICICI Lombard, Elecon, Hathway, and Tejas Networks.
news.summary:
Wipro, HDFC Life, HDFC AMC, CRISIL, Angel One among firms announcing Q4 results today.

news.title: Wipro to announce Q4 results today; revenue growth forecast 0.4-0.5%.
news.summary: Wipro to announce Q4 results today; revenue growth forecast 0.4-0.5%.

news.title: Nifty IT recovered 8% since April lows; focus shifts to Wipro results.
news.summary: Nifty IT recovered 8% since April lows; focus shifts to Wipro results.

news.title:
Wipro signs definitive agreement to acquire Alpha Net Group's customer contracts for $70.8M.
Acquisition enhances Wipro's AI-powered and consulting-led application services capabilities.
news.summary:
Wipro signs definitive agreement to acquire Alpha Net Group's customer contracts for $70.8M.
Acquisition enhances Wipro's AI-powered and consulting-led application services capabilities.

news.title:
Wipro's Q4FY26 earnings preview highlights weak performance, modest growth via acquisitions, and margin pressures from wage hikes.
Brokerages project 0.9% QoQ revenue growth, weak guidance, and a 23% YTD stock decline, underperforming the Nifty's 9% drop.
news.summary:
Wipro's Q4FY26 earnings preview highlights weak performance, modest growth via acquisitions, and margin pressures from wage hikes.
Brokerages project 0.9% QoQ revenue growth, weak guidance, and a 23% YTD stock decline, underperforming the Nifty's 9% drop.

news.title:
Wipro Ltd will announce Q4 FY26 results on April 16, post-market hours.
Earnings call rescheduled to 7:45 PM IST; details available on Wipro's website.
news.summary:
Wipro Ltd will announce Q4 FY26 results on April 16, post-market hours.
Earnings call rescheduled to 7:45 PM IST; details available on Wipro's website.

news.title:
Wipro's Q4FY26 IT revenue is estimated at ₹22,445-24,397 crore.
QoQ growth is projected at 0.8%-3.6% cc; YoY growth at 0.4%-1.2% cc.
news.summary:
Wipro's Q4FY26 IT revenue is estimated at ₹22,445-24,397 crore.
QoQ growth is projected at 0.8%-3.6% cc; YoY growth at 0.4%-1.2% cc.

news.title:
Key events this week include March inflation data, Wipro Q4 results, and special Parliament session on Women’s Reservation Bill.
Austrian Chancellor's visit and corporate earnings from HDFC, ICICI, and Yes Bank add to the week's economic momentum.
news.summary:
Key events this week include March inflation data, Wipro Q4 results, and special Parliament session on Women’s Reservation Bill.

news.title:
Indian markets rose ~6% last week, driven by hopes of US-Iran ceasefire and supportive global cues.
Q4 FY26 earnings from Wipro, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank are key triggers; crude prices and US-Iran talks to influence outlook.
news.summary:
Indian markets rose ~6% last week, driven by hopes of US-Iran ceasefire and supportive global cues.
Q4 FY26 earnings from Wipro, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank are key triggers; crude prices and US-Iran talks to influence outlook.

news.title:
HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and Yes Bank to announce Q4 results on April 18.
Wipro, ICICI Prudential Life, Den Networks, and others to reveal Q4 earnings next week.
news.summary:

news.title: Morgan Stanley retains Underweight rating on Wipro, sets target at 242.
news.summary: Morgan Stanley retains Underweight rating on Wipro, sets target at 242.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley maintains Underweight on Wipro with a ₹242 target, citing ~$2bn buyback (~8.5% market cap).
Strong cash position may boost sentiment, but weak FY27 revenue growth remains a key overhang.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley maintains Underweight on Wipro with a ₹242 target, citing ~$2bn buyback (~8.5% market cap).
Strong cash position may boost sentiment, but weak FY27 revenue growth remains a key overhang.

news.title:
Nifty IT index gained 9% in April; midcap IT outperformed largecap peers.
TCS results met expectations; Wipro announced a buyback, Infosys ADRs fell 1.5%.
news.summary:
Nifty IT index gained 9% in April; midcap IT outperformed largecap peers.
TCS results met expectations; Wipro announced a buyback, Infosys ADRs fell 1.5%.

news.title:
Infosys ADR fell 2.6% and Wipro ADR declined 1% after TCS reported a 2.4% CC revenue degrowth in FY26.
TCS's Q4 net profit rose 29% to Rs 13,720 crore, driven by AI focus with partnerships like Anthropic and Nvidia.
news.summary:
Infosys ADR fell 2.6% and Wipro ADR declined 1% after TCS reported a 2.4% CC revenue degrowth in FY26.
TCS's Q4 net profit rose 29% to Rs 13,720 crore, driven by AI focus with partnerships like Anthropic and Nvidia.

news.title:
Wipro to consider equity share buyback on April 16 alongside Q4 results; first since June 2023.
Investec estimates a potential buyback of ₹16,000 crore; Wipro holds ₹41,000 crore in net cash.
news.summary:
Wipro to consider equity share buyback on April 16 alongside Q4 results; first since June 2023.
Investec estimates a potential buyback of ₹16,000 crore; Wipro holds ₹41,000 crore in net cash.

news.title:
Wipro's board to discuss equity share buyback proposal on April 15-16, 2026.
Outcome of the meeting will be shared with exchanges per SEBI LODR regulations.
news.summary:
Wipro's board to discuss equity share buyback proposal on April 15-16, 2026.
Outcome of the meeting will be shared with exchanges per SEBI LODR regulations.

news.title:
TCS to announce Q4FY26 results on April 9, followed by Infosys, HCL Tech, Wipro, and Tech Mahindra. Brokerages favor HCL Tech and Tech Mahindra.
Nifty IT index down 23% YTD amid AI disruption fears; Motilal Oswal sees FY27 guidance, demand outlook, and deal wins as key investor focus.
news.summary:
TCS to announce Q4FY26 results on April 9, followed by Infosys, HCL Tech, Wipro, and Tech Mahindra. Brokerages favor HCL Tech and Tech Mahindra.
Nifty IT index down 23% YTD amid AI disruption fears; Motilal Oswal sees FY27 guidance, demand outlook, and deal wins as key investor focus.

news.title:
Wipro's deal with Mindsprint highlights increased M&A activity in Indian IT.
The trend emerges as Indian IT faces slowing growth, prompting strategic moves.
news.summary:
